title: Stable Insertion Sort with Incorrect Swap

editorial.title: Stable Insertion Sort with Incorrect Swap

solutions.python:
import sys

input = sys.stdin.readline

class Solution:
	def solve(self, nums):
			key=0
			i=1
		for i in range(1,len(nums)):
			if nums[i]<nums[i-1]:
				num=nums[i]
				nums[i-1]=nums[i]
				nums[i]=num
			
			key=nums[i]
			
			return sorted(nums)==nums

nums=list(map(int,input().split()))
	
	print('YES' if Solution().solve(nums) else 'NO')
